---
title: "Talks"
---

### Multi-Verifier Keyed-Verification Anonymous Credentials

- PrivCrypt 2026: [Read the slides](slides/PrivCrypt-mKVAC.pdf)
- COSIC seminar: [Watch the talk](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0fgxph8I6Aw)

### Keyed-Verification Anonymous Credentials with Highly Efficient Partial Disclosure

- PrivCrypt 2026: [Read the slides](slides/PrivCrypt-KVAC.pdf)
- NordiCrypt 2025
- COSIC seminar: [Watch the talk](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MILVlPhOqz0)
